milestones.title: Tokenizer
milestones.spec: tokenize(text) -> lowercase words (letters/digits only, split on non-alnum). normalize(text) trims and collapses whitespace. ESM; assertions in test() only.

milestones.title: Word frequencies
milestones.spec: wordCounts(tokens) -> Map word->count. topN(counts, n) -> [{word,count}] sorted desc. Empty input returns empty structures.

milestones.title: Document summary
milestones.spec: summarize(text) -> { words, lines, paragraphs, topWords }. Uses tokenize + wordCounts. paragraphs = blocks separated by blank lines.
